forgelabs_idea.title: AI Clinical Evidence Validator for Medical Device Submissions
forgelabs_idea.problem: MedTech companies spend 18+ months manually compiling clinical evidence for FDA submissions
forgelabs_idea.solution: AI agent that auto-extracts and validates clinical evidence from EHR data, research papers, and trial databases
forgelabs_idea.moat: Pre-trained on FDA submission requirements + regulatory precedents
forgelabs_idea.data_source: Public FDA 510(k) database, clinical trial registries, PubMed integration
forgelabs_idea.competition: Flinn.ai raised $20M but focuses on QMS workflows, not evidence compilation
forgelabs_idea.deploy_to: Azure Marketplace, medical device accelerators, regulatory consultancies

articles.title: Agentic AI in Clinical Data Management (2026 Guide)
articles.takeaway: Gartner projects 40%+ failure rate for agentic AI projects by 2027. Healthcare faces 70-85% unstructured data problem.
articles.linkedin_angle: Why most clinical AI agents fail - it's not the model, it's the context gap
articles.forge_relevance: Direct validation of our governance-first approach

articles.title: AI Governance in Healthcare: Turning Innovation Into Responsible Infrastructure
articles.takeaway: Healthcare AI needs governance frameworks from day one - not as afterthought
articles.linkedin_angle: Innovation becomes infrastructure only when responsibly managed

articles.title: Your AI Scribe Is Listening. Is Your Compliance Program?
articles.takeaway: AI scribe spending grew 2.4x in 2025 to $600M revenue. Sharp Healthcare faces class action for recording without consent
articles.linkedin_angle: The AI scribe boom's dark side: compliance litigation is here
articles.forge_relevance: Real-world validation that post-deployment governance gaps = legal exposure

articles.takeaway: AI moving from research labs to routine care - regulatory frameworks under pressure
articles.linkedin_angle: State AI oversight = preview of federal requirements

articles.title: AI in Healthcare: Navigating HIPAA Compliance
articles.takeaway: Open governance builds patient confidence beyond regulatory compliance

clinical_quote.text: Distributed governance equals handoffs. Handoffs kill people. You're building governance for the hospital you want, not the hospital that exists.
clinical_quote.context: Emergency department sepsis scenario with SOFA score 10
clinical_quote.validation: Confirms LUMEN's centralized governance model vs. fragmented oversight approaches
